lines.gurmukhi: ਮਗਰ ਪਾਛੈ ਕਛੁ ਨ ਸੂਝੈ ਏਹੁ ਪਦਮੁ ਅਲੋਅ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: magar paachhai kachh na soojhai ehu padam aloa |2|
lines.english: But they cannot even see what is behind them. What a strange lotus pose this is! ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਤ੍ਰੀਆ ਤ ਧਰਮੁ ਛੋਡਿਆ ਮਲੇਛ ਭਾਖਿਆ ਗਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: khatreea ta dharam chhoddiaa malechh bhaakhiaa gahee |
lines.english: The K'shatriyas have abandoned their religion, and have adopted a foreign language.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਸਭ ਇਕ ਵਰਨ ਹੋਈ ਧਰਮ ਕੀ ਗਤਿ ਰਹੀ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: srisatt sabh ik varan hoee dharam kee gat rahee |3|
lines.english: The whole world has been reduced to the same social status; the state of righteousness and Dharma has been lost. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਸਟ ਸਾਜ ਸਾਜਿ ਪੁਰਾਣ ਸੋਧਹਿ ਕਰਹਿ ਬੇਦ ਅਭਿਆਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: asatt saaj saaj puraan sodheh kareh bed abhiaas |
lines.english: They analyze eight chapters of (Panini's) grammar and the Puraanas. They study the Vedas,

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਮ ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਨਾਹੀ ਕਹੈ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਦਾਸੁ ॥੪॥੧॥੬॥੮॥
lines.translit: bin naam har ke mukat naahee kahai naanak daas |4|1|6|8|
lines.english: but without the Lord's Name, no one is liberated; so says Nanak, the Lord's slave. ||4||1||6||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨਾਸਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ਆਰਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: dhanaasaree mahalaa 1 aaratee |
lines.english: Dhanaasaree, First Mehl, Aartee:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੂਪੁ ਮਲਆਨਲੋ ਪਵਣੁ ਚਵਰੋ ਕਰੇ ਸਗਲ ਬਨਰਾਇ ਫੂਲੰਤ ਜੋਤੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: dhoop malaanalo pavan chavaro kare sagal banaraae foolant jotee |1|
lines.english: The fragrance of sandalwood is the incense, the wind is the fan, and all the vegetation are flowers in offering to You, O Luminous Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਗਨ ਮੈ ਥਾਲੁ ਰਵਿ ਚੰਦੁ ਦੀਪਕ ਬਨੇ ਤਾਰਿਕਾ ਮੰਡਲ ਜਨਕ ਮੋਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: gagan mai thaal rav chand deepak bane taarikaa manddal janak motee |
lines.english: In the bowl of the sky, the sun and moon are the lamps; the stars in the constellations are the pearls.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਹਤਾ ਸਬਦ ਵਾਜੰਤ ਭੇਰੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: anahataa sabad vaajant bheree |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The sound current of the Shabad is the sounding of the temple drums. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੈਸੀ ਆਰਤੀ ਹੋਇ ਭਵ ਖੰਡਨਾ ਤੇਰੀ ਆਰਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: kaisee aaratee hoe bhav khanddanaa teree aaratee |
lines.english: What a beautiful lamp-lit worship service this is! O Destroyer of fear, this is Your Aartee, Your worship service.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਸ ਤਵ ਨੈਨ ਨਨ ਨੈਨ ਹੈ ਤੋਹਿ ਕਉ ਸਹਸ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਨਨਾ ਏਕ ਤੋਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: sehas tav nain nan nain hai tohi kau sehas moorat nanaa ek tohee |
lines.english: Thousands are Your eyes, and yet You have no eyes. Thousands are Your forms, and yet You have not even one form.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਸ ਪਦ ਬਿਮਲ ਨਨ ਏਕ ਪਦ ਗੰਧ ਬਿਨੁ ਸਹਸ ਤਵ ਗੰਧ ਇਵ ਚਲਤ ਮੋਹੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sehas pad bimal nan ek pad gandh bin sehas tav gandh iv chalat mohee |2|
lines.english: Thousands are Your lotus feet, and yet You have no feet. Without a nose, thousands are Your noses. I am enchanted with Your play! ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਮਹਿ ਜੋਤਿ ਜੋਤਿ ਹੈ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabh meh jot jot hai soe |
lines.english: The Divine Light is within everyone; You are that Light.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੁ ਆਰਤੀ ਹੋਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jo tis bhaavai su aaratee hoe |3|
lines.english: That which pleases the Lord is the true worship service. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਕੈ ਚਾਨਣਿ ਸਭ ਮਹਿ ਚਾਨਣੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: tis kai chaanan sabh meh chaanan hoe |
lines.english: Yours is that Light which shines within everyone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸਾਖੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਪਰਗਟੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur saakhee jot paragatt hoe |
lines.english: By the Guru's Teachings, this Divine Light is revealed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਜਲੁ ਦੇਹਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਾਰਿੰਗ ਕਉ ਹੋਇ ਜਾ ਤੇ ਤੇਰੈ ਨਾਮਿ ਵਾਸਾ ॥੪॥੧॥੭॥੯॥
lines.translit: kripaa jal dehi naanak saaring kau hoe jaa te terai naam vaasaa |4|1|7|9|
lines.english: Bless Nanak, the thirsty song-bird, with the water of Your Mercy, that he may come to dwell in Your Name. ||4||1||7||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਚਰਣ ਕਮਲ ਮਕਰੰਦ ਲੋਭਿਤ ਮਨੋ ਅਨਦਿਨੋ ਮੋਹਿ ਆਹੀ ਪਿਆਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: har charan kamal makarand lobhit mano anadino mohi aahee piaasaa |
lines.english: My soul is enticed by the honey-sweet lotus feet of the Lord; night and day, I thirst for them.

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨਾਸਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ਘਰੁ ੨ ਚਉਪਦੇ ॥
lines.translit: dhanaasaree mahalaa 3 ghar 2 chaupade |
lines.english: Dhanaasaree, Third Mehl, Second House, Chau-Padhay:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰੈ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਦੀਆ ਦਿਖਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: poorai satigur deea dikhaae |
lines.english: The Perfect True Guru has revealed it to me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪੁਨੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕਉ ਸਦ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: apune satigur kau sad bal jaaee |
lines.english: I am forever a sacrifice to my True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਧਨੁ ਅਖੁਟੁ ਨ ਨਿਖੁਟੈ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: eihu dhan akhutt na nikhuttai na jaae |
lines.english: This wealth is inexhaustible. It shall never be exhausted, and it shall never be lost.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਪੂਰੈ ਹਰਿ ਧਨੁ ਪਰਗਾਸਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਵਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਆਇ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur poorai har dhan paragaasiaa har kirapaa te vasai man aae | rahaau |
lines.english: The Perfect Guru has revealed to me the Lord's treasure; by the Lord's Grace, it has come to abide in my mind. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਹਰਿ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gur kirapaa te har man vasaaee |1|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, I have enshrined the Lord within my mind. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਧਨਵੰਤ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: se dhanavant har naam liv laae |
lines.english: They alone are wealthy, who lovingly attune themselves to the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਵਗੁਣ ਕਾਟਿ ਗੁਣ ਰਿਦੈ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: avagun kaatt gun ridai samaae |
lines.english: He is rid of his demerits, and his heart is permeated with merit and virtue.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: poore gur kai sehaj subhaae |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, he naturally dwells in celestial peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਸਾਚੀ ਬਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: poore gur kee saachee baanee |
lines.english: True is the Word of the Perfect Guru's Bani.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖ ਮਨ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਣੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sukh man antar sehaj samaanee |2|
lines.english: They bring peace to the mind, and celestial peace is absorbed within. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੁ ਅਚਰਜੁ ਜਨ ਦੇਖਹੁ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: ek acharaj jan dekhahu bhaaee |
lines.english: O my humble Siblings of Destiny, behold this strange and wonderful thing:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦਿ ਵਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਆਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: gur parasaad vasai man aae |3|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, it comes to abide in the mind. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਬਿਧਾ ਮਾਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: dubidhaa maar har man vasaaee |
lines.english: duality is overcome, and the Lord dwells within his mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਅਮੋਲਕੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: naam amolak na paaeaa jaae |
lines.english: The Naam, the Name of the Lord, is priceless; it cannot be taken.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜੇ ਜਿਨਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਜਾਣਿ ਪਛਾਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: sahaje jin prabh jaan pachhaaniaa |
lines.english: One who intuitively knows and realizes God,

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਘਟਿ ਪਰਗਟੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: guramatee ghatt paragatt hoe |
lines.english: Through the Guru's Teachings, He is revealed in the heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਮਹਿ ਵਸੈ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਏਕੋ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabh meh vasai prabh eko soe |
lines.english: He is the One God, abiding within all.
